content.explanation:
**Application Writing — आवेदन पत्र लिखना:**

Applications are formal written requests. They follow a strict format.

**FORMAT OF A FORMAL APPLICATION:**

**[Your Name]**
**[Your Address]**
**[Date]**

**To,**
**The [Designation],**
**[Organization Name],**
**[Address]**

**Subject: Application for [reason]**

**Sir/Madam,**

**Body:**
**Paragraph 1:** State who you are and why you are writing.
**Paragraph 2:** Give details, explain the reason, provide facts.
**Paragraph 3:** Request/polite ask, express confidence.

**Thanking you,**
**Yours faithfully,**
**[Signature]**
**[Name]**

**Types of Applications:**
1. Leave Application (छुट्टी के लिए)
2. Job Application (नौकरी के लिए)
3. Complaint Application (शिकायत के लिए)
4. Scholarship Application (छात्रवृत्ति के लिए)
rules: Format is strict: Address → Date → Receiver → Subject → Salutation → Body → Close
Subject line: clear and specific (not vague)
"Yours sincerely" = when you know the name (Dear Mr. Sharma)
No contractions in formal writing: "I am" not "I'm"; "cannot" not "can't"
content.memoryTrick:
**Application = ADSB Format:**
**A**ddress (yours + receiver)
**D**ate
**S**ubject
**B**ody (3 paragraphs)
End: Yours faithfully/sincerely + Sign

examples.hindi: मैं 3 दिनों की छुट्टी के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I am writing to request a leave of 3 days.

examples.hindi: मुझे आपकी company में job में रुचि है।
examples.english: I wish to apply for the position of Marketing Executive at your esteemed company.

examples.hindi: मुझे खेद है कि यह सूचित करना पड़ रहा है।
examples.english: I regret to inform you that the situation has not improved.
I kindly request you to consider my application.

examples.hindi: मैं जल्द ही join करने में सक्षम हूँ।
examples.english: I am available to join at the earliest.

examples.hindi: इसके लिए मैं सदा आपका आभारी रहूँगा।
examples.english: I shall remain ever grateful for this favour.

mistakes.wrong: Respected Sir, I am writing this application to you that...
mistakes.correct: Dear Sir, I am writing to request...
mistakes.why: Avoid 'Respected' in English; 'Dear Sir/Madam' is standard formal salutation

mistakes.correct: Yours faithfully (when Sir/Madam) / Yours sincerely (when you know their name)
mistakes.why: 'Yours truly' is American casual — in formal British-Indian English, use faithfully/sincerely

mistakes.wrong: I want to inform you that I will not be able to come.
mistakes.correct: I am writing to inform you that I will be unable to attend.
mistakes.why: 'I want' sounds informal — 'I am writing to inform' is more formal

mistakes.wrong: Please grant me leave for 3 days on urgent basis.
mistakes.correct: I humbly request you to grant me leave for 3 days on urgent grounds.
mistakes.why: More formal phrasing with 'humbly request' and 'on grounds'

speakingTips: Read your application aloud after writing — check if it sounds professional.
Practise with AI tutor: 'Write a leave application for me for 2 days.'
Interview prep: 'How would you write a job application for a sales manager role?'

vocabulary.example: I wish to join your esteemed organization.
You would greatly oblige me by...
The forthcoming examination is on Monday.
I shall endeavour to give my best.

practice.hindi: मैं आपसे विनम्रतापूर्वक निवेदन करता हूँ।
कृपया मेरी छुट्टी की अर्जी स्वीकार करें।
मुझे दो दिन की छुट्टी चाहिए।
मैं बीमारी के कारण ऑफिस नहीं आ सकता।
practice.english: I am unable to come to the office due to illness.
alternatives: i cannot attend office because of sickness.
practice.hint: unable to = नहीं आ सकता, due to = के कारण

practice.hindi: कृपया मेरी समस्या पर ध्यान दें।
practice.english: Kindly pay attention to my problem.
practice.hint: kindly = कृपया, pay attention = ध्यान देना

practice.english: I shall be grateful to you.
alternatives: i will be thankful to you.

practice.hindi: आवेदन के साथ दस्तावेज़ संलग्न हैं।
practice.english: Documents are attached with the application.

practice.hindi: मैं आपकी अनुमति माँगना चाहता हूँ।
practice.english: I would like to seek your permission.

practice.hindi: मैं आपका निवेदन स्वीकार करने की विनती करता हूँ।
practice.english: I request you to accept my appeal.
alternatives: i urge you to approve my request.

practice.hindi: मैं इस पद के लिए आवेदन कर रहा हूँ।
practice.english: I am applying for this position.
alternatives: i wish to apply for this post.

practice.english: With reference to the above subject.
practice.hint: With reference to = के संदर्भ में

practice.hindi: कृपया जल्द से जल्द कार्यवाही करें।
practice.english: Kindly take action as soon as possible.
practice.hint: as soon as possible = जल्द से जल्द

practice.hindi: मैं इस संस्थान में प्रवेश का इच्छुक हूँ।
practice.english: I am desirous of getting admission to this institution.
alternatives: i wish to take admission here.

practice.hindi: कृपया मेरी समस्या का हल निकालें।
alternatives: kindly find a solution to my issue.
